details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectories: src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ all present. reports/audit/ exists. reports/board/ is MISSING.

memory_bank/ has key docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md, systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs. reports/audit/ exists. However, reports/board/ does NOT exist — governance contract partially incomplete.

Deprecated directories still present: moltbot/ (5 Python modules: orchestrator.py, promotion_discipline.py, board.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py), board/ (legacy EOD outputs under board/eod/out/). These should have been removed per prior governance cleanup.
